opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right calf is throbbing with a deep ache, and it has swollen up twice the size of my left leg since yesterday.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on out of nowhere yesterday, the whole calf is swollen, red and warm, and I'm limping badly. I only got back from a really long flight a few days ago.

symptom_narrative.onset: started yesterday, came on over a few hours
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, dull, throbbing ache in the calf muscle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that I'm limping heavily and can't really put my weight on it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right calf, the back of my lower leg
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, it doesn't come and go
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting and putting the leg up seems to ease it a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing and walking on it, and it hurts more if I pull my foot upward
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the whole calf is swollen to about twice the size of the other leg, and the skin looks red and feels warm and tight
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm limping and struggling to get around the house, and I live on my own so I'm worried about managing

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I'm generally healthy, no ongoing medical conditions that I know of

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: I'm not on any regular medicines — no blood thinners and not on the contraceptive pill

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Recently returned from a 14-hour long-haul flight three days ago; suitcase still half-unpacked. Lives alone and is normally independent but is finding it hard to get around with the sore leg.

objective_data_offered.value: right calf visibly swollen to roughly twice the size of the left leg, and the skin over it looks red
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: gross visual impression over video — not a measured circumference

objective_data_offered.value: the skin over the calf feels warm and tight to touch compared with the other leg

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer
single reading on a home oximeter

objective_data_offered.value: about 86 beats per minute on my smartwatch
